# kCFProxyAutoConfigurationURLKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFProxyAutoConfigurationURLKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyautoconfigurationurlkey)

-  kCFProxyAutoConfigurationURLKey 

Global Variable# kCFProxyAutoConfigurationURLKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFProxyAutoConfigurationURLKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyautoconfigurationurlkey#Discussion)

A `CFURL` value specifying the location of the proxy autoconfiguration (PAC) file. This key is only present for proxies of type `kCFProxyTypeAutoConfigurationURL`.
